report:for-each.declare: <!--FILTRO FormatRPT="PDF" oi_empresa="2" e_periodo="201308" orden1="" orden2=""><LIQUIDACIONES><LIQUIDACION id="1" /></LIQUIDACIONES></FILTRO--> <FILTRO FormatRPT="PDF" oi_empresa="2" e_periodo="201401" orden1="" orden2=""><LIQUIDACIONES></LIQUIDACIONES></FILTRO>

qry:select.name: qry_encabezado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'PlantillaLibroLey\'')/ROWS

qry:select.name: qry_cerrada
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'noValidarCerradas\'')/ROWS

qry:select.name: qry_domicilio
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'DomicilioLibroLey\'')/ROWS

qry:select.name: qry_familiares
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'FamiliaresLibroLey\'')/ROWS

qry:select.name: QRY_PARAM_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_domicilio, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_cuit, ORG34_ACTIVIDADES.d_actividad, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_localidad FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, ORG34_ACTIVIDADES JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_actividad INNER ORG34_ACTIVIDADES.oi_actividad WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_RECIBOS
qry_localidad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select org19_localidades.d_localidad, org35_provincias.d_provincia, org35_paises.d_pais from org19_localidades, org35_provincias, org35_paises where org19_localidades.oi_provincia = org35_provincias.oi_provincia and org35_provincias.oi_pais = org35_paises.oi_pais and org19_localidades.oi_localidad = {$SOURCE/@oi_localidad} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_RECIBO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT REC.oi_tot_liq_per, {%? (#PARAMIN:@orden1!=''){% {%=#PARAMIN:@orden1 %} as orden1,%}{% %} %} {%? (#PARAMIN:@orden2!=''){% {%=#PARAMIN:@orden2 %} as orden2,%}{% %} %} LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_personal, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.f_ingreso, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.f_egreso, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_cuil AS nro_cuil, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_convenio, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_categoria_ult as c_categoria, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.f_nacim, ORG22_EST_CIVIL.d_estado_civil, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_documento, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_tipo_documento, REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.n_totpag as total, REC.n_totsret AS rem, (REC.n_totnsret + REC.n_totasig) AS norem, (REC.n_totdesc + REC.n_totemb) AS retenciones FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as REC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG22_EST_CIVIL, ORG03_UBICACIONES(ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_empresa={%=$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa%}) JOIN REC.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_estado_civil LEFT OUTER ORG22_EST_CIVIL.c_estado_civil, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_ubicacion LEFT OUTER ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion WHERE REC.oi_tot_liq_per in ({%= $PARAM/@value %}) ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_CARGOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, C.oi_cargo_ddo, C.d_categoria, C.d_ubicacion, C.d_materia, C.d_grupo_costo, C.e_orden, C.f_ingreso, C.f_egreso FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, LIQ97_CARGOS AS C JOIN TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER C.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE TLP.oi_tot_liq_per in ({%=$PARAM/@value%}) ORDER BY e_orden ASC ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $RECIBOS/R join $r/@oi_tot_liq_per inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_DOMICILIO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_calle, PER01_DOMIC_PER.e_numero, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_piso, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_departamento, PER01_DOMIC_PER.c_postal, PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_localidad, LOC.d_localidad, LOC.d_provincia FROM PER01_PERSONAL, PER01_DOMIC_PER, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, (SELECT ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES, ORG35_PROVINCIAS JOIN ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia INNER ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia) AS LOC JOIN PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_personal, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER LOC.oi_localidad WHERE PER01_DOMIC_PER.l_domic_fiscal = 1 AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per in ({%= $PARAM/@value %}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $RECIBOS/R join $r/@oi_tot_liq_per inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_CATEGORIA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ94_CATEG.d_categoria FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ94_CONVENIOS, LIQ94_CATEG JOIN LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_convenio INNER LIQ94_CONVENIOS.c_convenio, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_categoria_ult INNER LIQ94_CATEG.c_categoria, LIQ94_CONVENIOS.oi_convenio_ddo INNER LIQ94_CATEG.oi_convenio_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_codif_ddo INNER LIQ94_CONVENIOS.oi_codif_ddo WHERE LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per IN ({%=$PARAM/@value%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $RECIBOS/R join $r/@oi_tot_liq_per inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_DETALLE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.e_secuencia, CLP.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.c_concepto, CON.d_concepto, CLP.n_valor, CLP.n_cantidad, CON.c_tipo_concepto, CON.ca_fig_recibo FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, liq20_conc_liq_per AS CLP, liq96_conceptos AS CON, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS TC JOIN TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CLP.oi_tot_liq_per , CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CLP.oi_concepto_ddo, TC.c_tipo_concepto INNER CON.c_tipo_concepto WHERE CON.ca_fig_recibo != \'N\' and (isnull(CON.e_etapa) or CON.e_etapa != 1) and CLP.n_valor != 0 and TC.l_nolistado = 0 and TLP.oi_tot_liq_per IN ({%=$PARAM/@value%}) ORDER BY c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $RECIBOS/R join $r/@oi_tot_liq_per inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_DETALLE_CARGO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.e_secuencia, CLP.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.c_concepto, CON.d_concepto, CC.n_valor, CC.n_cantidad, CON.c_tipo_concepto, CC.oi_cargo_ddo, CON.ca_fig_recibo FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS TLP, liq20_conc_liq_per AS CLP, LIQ20_CONC_CARGO AS CC, liq96_conceptos AS CON, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS TC JOIN TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CLP.oi_tot_liq_per , CLP.oi_conc_liq_per INNER CC.oi_conc_liq_per, CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CLP.oi_concepto_ddo, TC.c_tipo_concepto INNER CON.c_tipo_concepto WHERE CON.ca_fig_recibo != \'N\' and CON.e_etapa = 1 and CLP.n_valor != 0 and TC.l_nolistado = 0 and TLP.oi_tot_liq_per IN ({%=$PARAM/@value%}) ORDER BY c_concepto ASC ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $RECIBOS/R/CA join $r/@oi_cargo_ddo inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_FAMILIAR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, PER15_TIPOS_FAM.d_tipo_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.d_ape_y_nom, PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_nro_documento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.f_nacimiento FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER, PER15_TIPOS_FAM, PER20_TIPOS_DOC JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_tipo_familiar INNER PER15_TIPOS_FAM.c_tipo_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_tipo_documento LEFT OUTER PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per IN ({%=$PARAM/@value%}) AND LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.l_vive = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $RECIBOS/R join $r/@oi_tot_liq_per inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_ASIG_FAMILIAR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER15_TIPOS_FAM.d_tipo_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.d_ape_y_nom as familiar, PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.oi_fam_per_ddo, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_nro_documento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.f_nacimiento, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_sexo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_nro_cuil, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_gen, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER, PER15_TIPOS_FAM, PER20_TIPOS_DOC JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_tipo_familiar INNER PER15_TIPOS_FAM.c_tipo_familiar, LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.c_tipo_documento LEFT OUTER PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per IN ({%=$PARAM/@value%}) AND LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.l_vive = 1 AND LIQ97_FLIARES_PER.l_acargo_af = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

xsl:value-of.select: 'Libro de Sueldo y Jornales - Ley 20744 (T.O. Artículo 52) - Registro Único - Periodo '
'Detalle de familiares a cargo asignaciones familiares por legajo'
